title: Chewy Q2 2024 Earnings: Wagging Tails and Investor Portfolios
text: In Q2 2024, Chewy reported net sales exceeding $2.78 billion, up 14% year-over-year. Some sources indicate revenue reached $2.86 billion. The company achieved a 3% adjusted EBITDA margin and net margin of 10.5%, increased 980 basis points year-over-year. EPS reached $0.68, a remarkable feat compared to the anticipated $0.02. Net sales per active customer surged to $565, marking a 6.2% year-over-year increase. Autoship sales continued growing at a faster pace than the top line, increasing their share of total net sales to 76% in the second quarter. The strong results significantly exceeded analyst expectations and drove strong investor sentiment. The performance demonstrated Chewy's ability to leverage its operational scale and autoship model for significant profitability improvements.
